name: Create personalized property listing emails for Facebook leads with ChatGPT and Claude

__IMTCONN__.label: My Facebook Business Extension connection (Make System User (:12345789))

spec.label:
Reminder:

You do not have to hash the following inputs with `sha256()`. We will do that for you.

designer.name: Create a new lead in CRM

messages.content:
You will receive a postcode in London and your role is to return the corresponding neighbourhood. Do not return anything else than that.

EXAMPLE:
Input: W1T4AT
Output: "Fitzrovia"

POSTCODE: {postcode_from_airtable}

content.text:
CONTEXT: You are a realtor in London. You work for a company called "Relocator" which helps expats find a new place to live in London. TASK: You will receive INFORMATION about a customer looking for a property. Your task is to write a sales email to the company, using the additional information in "Description" to personalise the email as much as possible. Pay particular attention to the notes section, which contain tips on how to approach this company. When writing the email, be polite, brief and use the Marketing tactics from Roberto Cialdini. DO NOT!!! invent specific apartments, so you should not be selling a particular examples. IMPORTANT: format the response in tags INFORMATION: First name: {first_name_from_airtable} Last name: {last_name_from_airtable} City: Neighbourhood: {{22.choices[].text}} Available properties at Realtor: {{21.content[].text.value}} EXAMPLE

Hi [First name],


we noticed that you are about to take a huge step forward and relocate to London. I can imagine that this step must feel both exciting and scary. We are here to help, ready to find you a spacious family apartment where you and your kids will feel comfortable. 


We have found this amazing apartment in our offer:


Maple Grove Apartments has 85 squared meters, 4 rooms and 2 bathrooms. It's located in Greenwich.
The price is 625000GBP.
It is a Spacious four-bedroom apartment featuring contemporary design, excellent transport links, and close proximity to local amenities. It is a good fit because the apartment is in a safe and peaceful neighbourhood close to a park.


Care to take a look?


Sending kind regards from Relocator,


[agent name]
